top.title: Trump says US to pause operation to guide vessels through Strait of Hormuz
top.summary: "Project Freedom", which began on Monday, will be halted because progress has been made toward a deal with Iran, the US president says.

top.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
top.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

top.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins Republican nomination for Ohio governor
top.summary: He spent much of the race criticising the state's response to the Covid-19 pandemic led by the Democrat nominee.

top.title: Apple to pay $250m to US iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
top.summary: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

top.title: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
top.summary: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.

top.title: 'I thought he was going to hit me' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
top.summary: OpenAI president Greg Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.

title.#text: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
Apple agrees to pay iPhone owners $250 million for not delivering AI Siri
Microsoft gives up on Xbox Copilot AI
